DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

Appearances:
Lorena Nunez, Esq. of Ogletree Deakins, Tel:415.369.3545, for defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopted the tentative ruling:

DEFENDANT EUROPEAN WAX CENTER's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
